calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jon C. James of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing through CourtCall for defendant Foster Wheeler LLC.

RULING:
Not argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). No opposition filed. The trial date of October 5, 2020 is vacated. The new trial date is January 4, 2021 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is January 15, 2021. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the initial October 5, 2020 trial date. Plaintiff to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than November 20, 2020. Responses to the demand are due no later than December 4, 2020. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by December 25, 2020 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, December 31, 2020 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Continued To Sep-17-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial is continued on the Court's own motion to September 17, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Set For Trial
